title: Mould King V12 Engine Building Block Sets, V12 Engine Model Kit That Runs, MOC Engineering Model Building Kit with Battery and Motor, Engineering Building Blocks for Adults (3472 PCS)
features: Build Your Own V12 Engine Building Kit: The V12 engine model is the legendary heart of sports cars, and the Mould King V12 engine building kit reproduces the true dynamic principles in 1:1 scale. Equipped with a L motor and battery box, it delivers outstanding performance and lightning fast acceleration, making it an artful collection for supercar enthusiasts and fans.

Electric Drive - High Performance Output: Adopting electric drive mode, it is equipped with a 6.5-liter engine building sets consisting of 12 cylinders, which integrates a specially developed aerodynamic piping and cooling system to ensure efficient work at high speeds and meet the requirements of high power and heat dissipation.

Observe the Real Details: Imagine building a precision V12 engine building block sets with your own hands and running it by simply pressing the start switch. By gently removing the protective cover, you can visualize the internal operation details of the engine, the valve transmission, the up and down movement of the 12-cylinder piston, reproducing the engine's operation process. Challenge your hands and utilize your creativity.

Easy To Assemble: Mould King V12 Engine building kits is assembled from 3472 block parts and comes with colorful paper instructions to help you assemble it easily. This building kits is compatible with mainstream building blocks. All parts are easy to assemble and will not fall apart.

Gift Box Packaging: This construction toy comes in a colorful cardboard package, great gift for birthday/children's day/Christmas/New Year, especially for kids, teenagers and adults aged 8+. All of our products are strictly inspected before shipment. If you encounter any issues during installation or use, please let us know. Mould King will always be there for you.
